summary: The crawl resulted in all products being flagged due to missing specifications, despite having detailed descriptions. This indicates significant extraction issues that need to be addressed.
strengths: No failed scrapes, indicating a reliable scraping process.
All products are in stock and available for purchase.
main_issues: All products have empty specifications fields.
Low confidence in the accuracy of extracted data due to missing specifications.

llm_impact.observation: No LLM calls were made during the extraction process, which may have contributed to the missing specifications.

recommended_next_steps: Implement LLM-based extraction for specifications to improve data accuracy.
Review and enhance the extraction rules to ensure specifications are captured from product descriptions.
Conduct a follow-up crawl after adjustments to verify improvements in data quality.
